{{CargoRelic
|name=Time Rift Postcard I
|class_id=20110
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=While scouting for info about Time Rift, the snail also recorded a lot of local customs, which were brought together in this postcard. You can read it to kill time and post it online to get many likes!
|fame=14
|art=33
|fth=13
|civ=12
|tech=18
|ss1=Rift Museum medal output +5
|ss2=Rift Museum medal output +10
|ss3=Rift Museum medal output +15
|ss4=Rift Museum medal output +15
|ss7=Rift Museum medal output +15<br> (Awakened)
}}
